% --- CONSTRAINTS LIST ---
\section*{Model Constraints}
\begin{longtable}{p{0.35\textwidth} p{0.6\textwidth}}
\textbf{Constraint Name} & \textbf{Description} \\
\hline
\endhead
\texttt{Annual Mining Limit} & Restricts mining based on global availability and sector share \\
\texttt{BESS Capacity Requirement} & Ensures BESS installations meet the calculated demand \\
\texttt{BESS Demand Calculation} & Calculates required BESS capacity based on other tech installations \\
\texttt{Capacity Growth Balance} & Tracks installed capacity evolution (New - Decommissioned) \\
\texttt{Component Balance} & Ensures component supply meets manufacturing demand \\
\texttt{Cumulative Production Threshold} & Links cumulative production to the active learning step \\
\texttt{Decommissioned Capacity} & Calculates capacity reaching end of life based on lifetime or exogenous factors \\
\texttt{Domestic Stockpile Balance} & Tracks domestic stock levels with obsolescence \\
\texttt{Extension CAPEX} & Calculates total CAPEX for processing and manufacturing \\
\texttt{Extension OPEX} & Calculates total OPEX including mining and electricity \\
\texttt{Extension Trade Cost} & Calculates costs for material and part imports \\
\texttt{Factory Energy Demand} & Calculates total annual energy required for manufacturing \\
\texttt{Factory Power Profile} & Distributes annual factory energy demand to timesteps \\
\texttt{Gas Block Balance} & Ensures sum of block usage equals total gas stock usage \\
\texttt{Gas Block Limit} & Restricts annual gas usage per block to defined limits \\
\texttt{Gas Cost Calculation} & Calculates annual gas cost with discount factors \\
\texttt{Gas Usage Definition} & Tracks total gas usage per block for reporting \\
\texttt{Global Resource Depletion} & Tracks remaining global reserves \\
\texttt{Import Composition} & Splits imports into flow and storage \\
\texttt{Imported Stockpile Balance} & Tracks imported stock levels with obsolescence \\
\texttt{Installation Supply Link} & Links manufacturing output to energy model capacity additions \\
\texttt{Learning Step Selection} & Forces exactly one learning step to be active per stage \\
\texttt{Linearization Lower Bound} & Ensures Aux variable tracks production when binary is active \\
\texttt{Linearization Non-Negativity} & Ensures auxiliary variable is non-negative \\
\texttt{Linearization Upper Bound Q} & Ensures Aux variable does not exceed actual production \\
\texttt{Linearization Upper Bound Z} & Big-M constraint for linearization (Aux <= M * Binary) \\
\texttt{Material Demand Calculation} & Calculates material demand based on production and intensity \\
\texttt{Material Supply Balance} & Balances material demand with mining, imports, and recycling \\
\texttt{Max Domestic Stockpile} & Limits domestic storage to 25% of production \\
\texttt{Max Import Stockpile} & Limits imported storage to 25% of total imports \\
\texttt{New Capacity Balance} & Calculates energy generation from newly installed capacity \\
\texttt{New Capacity Limit} & Restricts annual new capacity to defined installable limits \\
\texttt{Price Monotonicity} & Ensures price reductions cannot decrease (no unlearning) \\
\texttt{Processing Capacity Balance} & Tracks total processing capacity accumulation \\
\texttt{Processing Growth Limit} & Limits annual processing capacity expansion \\
\texttt{Processing Output Limit} & Ensures processing capacity covers production output \\
\texttt{Production Composition} & Splits production into flow and storage \\
\texttt{Recycling Growth Limit} & Limits annual increase in recycling capacity \\
\texttt{Scrap Capacity Balance} & Tracks total scrap handling capacity accumulation \\
\texttt{Scrap Cost Savings} & Calculates total cost savings for recycling based on active scaling step \\
\texttt{Scrap Cumulative Threshold} & Links cumulative recycling capacity to the active learning step \\
\texttt{Scrap for Recycling} & Calculates scrap input required for secondary production \\
\texttt{Scrap from Decommissioning} & Calculates scrap amount generated from decommissioned capacity \\
\texttt{Scrap Growth Limit} & Limits annual scrap handling capacity expansion \\
\texttt{Scrap Handling Limit} & Ensures scrap handling capacity covers scrap recycling \\
\texttt{Scrap Linearization Lower Bound} & Ensures scrap aux variable tracks output when binary is active \\
\texttt{Scrap Linearization Non-Negativity} & Ensures scrap aux variable is non-negative \\
\texttt{Scrap Linearization Upper Bound Q} & Ensures scrap aux variable does not exceed actual output \\
\texttt{Scrap Linearization Upper Bound Z} & Big-M constraint for scrap linearization \\
\texttt{Scrap Price Monotonicity} & Ensures recycling price reductions cannot decrease over time \\
\texttt{Scrap Processing Cost} & Calculates cost of recycling minus learning benefits \\
\texttt{Scrap Recycling Link} & Calculates pure material recovered from scrap processing \\
\texttt{Scrap Reduction Target} & Forces reduction of scrap pile over time \\
\texttt{Scrap Step Selection} & Forces exactly one recycling scale step to be active \\
\texttt{Scrap Unit Price Reduction} & Calculates current unit price reduction for recycling \\
\texttt{Solar Balance Conversion} & Constrains generation profile based on capacity and solar load factor \\
\texttt{Stage Cost Savings} & Calculates total cost savings based on active learning step \\
\texttt{Stockpile Holding Cost} & Calculates cost for holding inventory \\
\texttt{Stockpile Total} & Sums domestic and imported stockpiles \\
\texttt{Stockpile Turnover Domestic} & Enforces minimum turnover rate for domestic stock \\
\texttt{Stockpile Turnover Imports} & Enforces minimum turnover rate for imported stock \\
\texttt{Supply Definition} & Aggregates flow and stockout variables into total Supply \\
\texttt{Total Gas Cost} & Sums annual gas costs into a total objective term \\
\texttt{Total Scrap Accumulation} & Tracks cumulative scrap availability \\
\texttt{Unit Price Reduction} & Calculates current unit price reduction based on active binary \\
\hline
\end{longtable}
